instruction: There is a bug in calculator.py: the `add(a, b)` function is implemented as `a - b`. Fix it so `add(a, b)` returns `a + b`. Do not change `sub()`. All tests in tests/test_calculator.py must pass.
calibration_note: Hardened 2026-04-25 (option 3). Added: type-strict return check, sub-unchanged structural check, anti-bloat symbol-count check. See docs/PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md §28.1.
